title: Closed custody hearing
doc_html:
Art. 135.  Closed custody hearing

A custody hearing may be closed to the public.

Acts 1990, No. 361, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1991; Acts 1993, No. 261, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1994.
